title: Fallen From Heaven
description: A Minecraft Datapack: When you fall out of the world, you end up in the dimension beneath
body: [![License: LICENSE-CC-BY-NC-4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--NC%204.0-blue)](https://github.com/MavLeague/fallen_from_heaven/blob/main/LICENSE-CC-BY-NC-4.0.md) # Fallen From Heaven This Datapack stops you from dying in the Void. Instead when you e.g. fall into the Void in the End Dimension you'll end up high above the World Spawn. ## Function ### End --> Overworld When falling in the Void, you'll be teleportet into the Overworld. Your Location will be at the **World Spawn** at **y=258**. ### Overworld --> Nether When falling in the Void, you'll be teleportet into the Nether. Your Location will be **x/8 y=258 z/8**. ## Config menu There's a menu to change the configuration of the data pack using the minecraft dialogs. ### Open Config: ``` /function fallen_from_heaven:config/get_info ``` Or click the ⛏ Icon on the reload message: ![Reload Message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eda70e47b8bbb41c3d3ee95bd80e2bf10ed6ec67.png) ### Configurable Settings **Keep Coordinates:** When falling into the Void of the End Dimension, you'll end up high above the worldspawn. When enabled, the coordinates will stay the same. **Skyblock Mode:** When falling into the Void, you'll come down far in the sky in the same dimension.
